name: kyndlo
description: Codex-native access to Kyndlo dashboard, events, validation, and agent access workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Kyndlo through MCP with a scoped Kyndlo API token.
interface.longDescription: Use Kyndlo dashboard, event creation, validation, moderation, agent access, and admin workflows from Codex with token-scoped MCP tools and preview-confirm safety for high-risk actions. Authentication is handled with a scoped Kyndlo API token provided to Codex as KYNDLO_API_TOKEN.
defaultPrompt: Use Kyndlo to show my MCP identity and available dashboard permissions. If not connected, ask me to set KYNDLO_API_TOKEN.
Use Kyndlo to review users and access groups in the dashboard.
Use Kyndlo to create or validate events with preview-confirm for high-risk changes.
